text: I am drawn inward as I walk these clean, quiet corridors toward a space designed for curiosity and innovation. Crossing the threshold into the R+D showcase, I feel a surge of anticipation. The walls themselves pulse with colors and words about responsiveness and intelligence—concepts that both fascinate and unsettle me. Surrounded by technology and curious minds, I become quietly contemplative, aware of the strange duality between connection and isolation that technology inspires. I feel like an observer, always interpreting, always slightly set apart.
